title: Event: 2022 Distinguished Lectureship
subject: SAGP | 2022 Distinguished Lectureship
rich_html:
Dorothea Frede is Professor Emerita of Philosophy at Hamburg University.
🏛️
SAGP
Society for Ancient Greek Philosophy

SAGP Event

2022 Distinguished Lectureship

Dorothea Frede is Professor Emerita of Philosophy at Hamburg University.

Abstract

At the beginning of the Nicomachean Ethics, Aristotle invokes the need for a master-science that determines the good human life in a community by providing for its order and laws. Frede examines legislation, its role in Aristotle’s ethical and political thought, and its compatibility with Aristotle’s apparent preference for a theoretical form of life.

Event Details

Date December 16, 2022
Location Zoom
EDT

Program

Distinguished Lecture

December 16, 2022 · 13:00 EDT

  • Aristotle’s ‘Political Architect’ and the City of His Prayers
    Dorothea Frede
